title: ContractLens MS2 Playbook Schema
description: Milestone 2 playbook schema for ContractLens. Extends playbook.yaml with schema_version, retrieval_mode, and per-hypothesis agent metadata while preserving the full 17-hypothesis legal risk logic.

checks.title: Explicit identification
checks.hypothesis_text: All Confidential Information shall be expressly identified by the Disclosing Party.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to require express identification/marking of Confidential Information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to take the opposite position (i.e., not all Confidential Information must be expressly identified). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly impose an express identification/marking requirement. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Technical-only scope
checks.hypothesis_text: Confidential Information shall only include technical information.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA limits Confidential Information to technical information only. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not limit Confidential Information to technical information only (it appears broader). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly state that Confidential Information is limited to technical information only. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Verbal information included
checks.hypothesis_text: Confidential Information may include verbally conveyed information.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA permits Confidential Information to include oral/verbal disclosures (typically subject to conditions). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to exclude orally conveyed information from the Confidential Information definition. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address whether orally conveyed information is treated as Confidential Information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Purpose limitation
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party shall not use any Confidential Information for any purpose other than the purposes stated in Agreement.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA restricts use of Confidential Information to the stated purpose(s) only. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to allow use of Confidential Information beyond the stated purpose(s), which is a policy conflict. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly restrict use of Confidential Information to the stated purpose(s). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Disclosure to employees
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party may share some Confidential Information with some of Receiving Party’s employees.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA permits sharing Confidential Information with employees (typically on a need-to-know basis). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to prohibit sharing Confidential Information with employees, which may be operationally impractical. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address whether employees may receive Confidential Information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Disclosure to third parties / representatives
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party may share some Confidential Information with some third-parties (including consultants, agents and professional advisors).

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA permits disclosure to third parties such as consultants/advisors (typically under confidentiality obligations). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to prohibit disclosure to third parties/representatives, which is typically addressed via a controlled 'representatives' carve-out. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address whether disclosure to third parties/representatives is permitted. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Notice for compelled disclosure
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party shall notify Disclosing Party in case Receiving Party is required by law, regulation or judicial process to disclose any Confidential Information.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA requires notice to the Disclosing Party before/when compelled disclosure occurs (subject to legal constraints). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears not to require notice for compelled disclosure, which may reduce the Disclosing Party’s ability to seek protective measures. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly require notice in the event of compelled disclosure. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Confidentiality of the agreement/existence
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party shall not disclose the fact that Agreement was agreed or negotiated.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA treats the existence/negotiation of the agreement as confidential. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to allow disclosure of the fact of the agreement/negotiation. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address confidentiality of the agreement’s existence or negotiation. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: No reverse engineering
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party shall not reverse engineer any objects which embody Disclosing Party’s Confidential Information.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA prohibits reverse engineering of objects embodying Confidential Information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears not to prohibit reverse engineering (or permits it), which may require a tighter restriction depending on context. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address reverse engineering restrictions. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Independent development permitted
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party may independently develop information similar to Confidential Information.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA permits independent development of similar information; this may be acceptable but often requires careful scoping. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to restrict independent development of similar information; this may be acceptable depending on the relationship and purpose. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address independent development of similar information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Third-party acquisition permitted
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party may acquire information similar to Confidential Information from a third party.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA permits acquiring similar information from third parties (subject to not breaching confidentiality obligations). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to restrict acquisition of similar information from third parties; this may require negotiation depending on business needs. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address third-party acquisition of similar information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: No rights / no license
checks.hypothesis_text: Agreement shall not grant Receiving Party any right to Confidential Information.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA includes a no-rights/no-license position regarding Confidential Information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to grant rights or license-like permissions regarding Confidential Information, which may be a policy conflict. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly state that no rights/licenses are granted regarding Confidential Information. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Return or destruction on termination
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party shall destroy or return some Confidential Information upon the termination of Agreement.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA requires return or destruction of Confidential Information upon termination (often with limited archival exceptions). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears not to require return/destruction upon termination, which is typically unacceptable without alternative controls. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly require return or destruction of Confidential Information upon termination. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Copying permitted in some circumstances
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party may create a copy of some Confidential Information in some circumstances.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA permits copying Confidential Information in certain circumstances (typically with controls). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to prohibit copying Confidential Information, which may require negotiation for operational practicality. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address whether copying Confidential Information is permitted under controlled circumstances. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Non-solicitation
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party shall not solicit some of Disclosing Party’s representatives.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA includes a non-solicitation restriction regarding the Disclosing Party’s representatives. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears not to impose non-solicitation restrictions; this is often optional and context-dependent. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not include a clear non-solicitation restriction; this is often optional depending on the engagement. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Survival of obligations
checks.hypothesis_text: Some obligations of Agreement may survive termination of Agreement.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA indicates that certain obligations survive termination (commonly confidentiality and related duties). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to state that obligations do not survive termination, which may conflict with typical confidentiality expectations. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly state that confidentiality or related obligations survive termination. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.

checks.title: Retention after return/destruction
checks.hypothesis_text: Receiving Party may retain some Confidential Information even after the return or destruction of Confidential Information.

rationale_templates.satisfied: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA permits retention of some Confidential Information after return/destruction, which typically requires narrow exceptions and safeguards. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.conflict: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA appears to prohibit retention after return/destruction; this may be acceptable, but confirm operational and compliance constraints. Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
rationale_templates.missing: {HYPOTHESIS_TITLE}: The NDA does not clearly address whether any retention is permitted after return/destruction (e.g., backups or legal compliance). Severity {SEVERITY}; action {ACTION}.
